title: 毎日王冠の後に・溶け落ちた翼

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa does her best, but she's no match
for Silence Suzuka, the Otherworldly
Front-Runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And afterward, she passes out from pushing
herself beyond her limits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One thing has become painfully clear to El
Condor Pasa—if there are racers like Silence
Suzuka at the Japan Cup, she doesn't stand a
chance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hangs her head dejectedly as she decides to
give up on her goal of winning the Japan Cup in
her classic year.
